warnings.issue: MemberCreatedEvent actor hardcoded as 'system'; should use authenticated user in future

principles.name: Simplicity First
principles.notes: Minimal code: 1 service, 1 listener, 1 event record, 1 migration. No speculative abstractions

principles.name: Surgical Changes
principles.notes: Only touched necessary files. Test fixes in 4 files were required by Lombok constructor change

principles.name: Goal-Driven Execution
principles.notes: All 3 plans verified with compile + test after each step

principles.name: Prefer shared utility packages over hand-rolled helpers
principles.notes: Uses existing Spring events, JPA repos, Lombok patterns. No new utilities

principles.name: Don't probe data YOLO-style
principles.notes: Account lookup via explicit repository queries with typed return values

principles.name: Validate boundaries
principles.notes: ensureLoanSubAccount validates member accounts exist before proceeding. Idempotent creation checks

security.notes: No new REST endpoints. Internal event-driven communication only. No secrets/PII in logs (only IDs and member numbers)

contractCompatibility.notes: Account entity: 2 new nullable columns — backward compatible. Liquibase addColumn with nullable — safe. No API contract changes

failureBehavior.notes: BEFORE_COMMIT listeners roll back parent transaction on failure (desired). ensureLoanSubAccount throws IllegalStateException if no existing accounts. Idempotent createSubAccountIfAbsent prevents duplicates

testQuality.notes: 7 new tests: 5 for AccountSetupServiceImpl (happy path, idempotent skip, error), 2 for MemberAccountListener (delegation), 1 for MemberServiceImpl (event publishing). Edge cases covered

scopeHygiene.notes: No drive-by refactors. 4 test file fixes were necessary due to @AllArgsConstructor signature change
